title: RCR Crystal Melodia Luxion 360 ml Tumbler & 230 ml High Ball Glasses, Cocktail, Short Whiskey Glasses, Made in Italy, Dishwasher Safe, for Newlyweds & New Homeowners, 12-Piece Set
features: Serve up striking Italian style and craftsmanship to any home, bar or dining table with the Melodia Glassware collection from RCR.

Since 1967 RCR Crystal has dedicated itself to the pursuit of cutting-edge, high-performance glassware, all produced from the company's headquarters in the heart of Tuscany. The Melodia range follows in that proud tradition, adorned with a beautiful cut glass decoration that brings timeless elegance and sophistication to any surrounding.

Each piece in this collection has been crafted from RCR's special LUXION glass - an eco-friendly material that boasts exceptional clarity and shine, high resistance to shock and impact and perfect acoustics. LUXION has also been tested for over 4000 washes in professional dishwashers without even a hint of clouding, so you can be confident that these glasses will stand as a sparkling centrepiece in your glassware collection for years to come!
Dimensions: Highball C: 360ml D: 7cm H: 15cm Whisky C: 240ml D: 7.5cm H: 8.5cm
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: From the manufacturer Est 1967 Continuing a centuries old tradition, RCR supply to over 100 countries worldwide offering elegant designs, with creativity and innovation at the heart of their values. An Icon of the Italian Glass Industry The Melodia Collection Devoted to producing the highest quality crystal glassware, RCR has emerged as an icon of the Italian glass industry. Designed and manufactured in Tuscany, Italy their stunning collection of glasses is created using 100% renewable energy. The glassware is made from Luxion crystal, which has set the company apart from the rest. The Melodia Collection is a full line of classic style glassware, which radiates brilliance and offers homes a range that will sparkle on the table. Transparency Sonority Brilliance Dishwasher resistance Perfect for dinner parties Classic Style The RCR Melodia Collection offers a classic design combined with the brilliance of pure raw materials, ideal for beautifully dressing the table for dinner parties. Impress family and friends with the design and let the light reflect from the glasses to provide a dazzling gleaming effect. Innovative Material Specially crafted from Luxion crystal. RCR have created the first 100% recyclable eco glass material, combining the same brilliance but with a minimal impact on the environment. Luxion is safe and reliable and does not alter the taste or flavours in any way. Scratch Resistant Use without worry, as the Melodia collection is scratch and friction free meaning you can comfortably use the glasses for everyday use or confidently buy as a gift for newlyweds and new home owners. Dishwasher Safe Made for your ease, pour red wine, add fruit or make cocktails in this brilliant glassware and simply pop in the dishwasher once finished ensuring a safe and simple clean. Making dinner times easy and with a beautiful design, this collection is the perfect addition for any home. A Touch of the Tropics Introducing a traditional table setting, the Melodia Collection combines an extensive classic line with a pattern emphasising brilliancy. Intricate and featuring a palm tree inspired design, the Melodia Collection features hi-ball tumblers, whiskey glasses, whiskey decanters, round wine decanters, crystal jugs, flower vases, wine glasses and flutes. Crafted from the finest Luxion crystal, the eco glassware exudes characteristics of brilliance, transparency, resistance, perfect acoustics and is dishwasher safe.
